2605.06316.title: Pro-KLShampoo: Projected KL-Shampoo with Whitening Recovered by Orthogonalization
2605.06316.paper_summary: Optimizers that exploit the matrix structure of gradients are central to modern LLM pre-training, with two distinct frontiers: explicit Kronecker-factored preconditioning -- most recently KL-Shampoo, which estimates the preconditioner via KL divergence minimization -- and orthogonalization of the gradient momentum, exemplified by Muon and analyzed as steepest descent under the spectral norm. The two routes are typically developed in isolation. We make a structural observation about KL-Shampoo's Kronecker preconditioners: their eigenvalue spectra exhibit a \emph{spike-and-flat} shape -- a few dominant eigenvalues followed by an approximately uniform tail -- across layers and training stages, holding exactly under a rank-$ρ$ signal-plus-noise gradient model. We exploit this structure by restricting one of KL-Shampoo's Kronecker factors to a parametric family aligned with the spike-and-flat shape: full spectral structure on a tracked $r$-dimensional subspace, single shared eigenvalue across the remaining $n-r$ directions. On these directions, we apply orthogonalization. An identity shows that this orthogonalization recovers the algebraic form of full KL-Shampoo's preconditioner. On four pre-training scales (GPT-2 124M / 350M, LLaMA 134M / 450M), Pro-KLShampoo consistently outperforms KL-Shampoo at every subspace rank we test in validation loss, peak per-GPU memory, and wallclock time to reach each loss level.
2605.06316.paper_summary_zh: 利用梯度的矩陣結構的優化器是現代大型語言模型（LLM）預訓練的核心，具有兩個明確的前沿：顯式的克羅內克預條件化——最近的 KL-Shampoo，通過最小化 KL 散度來估計預條件器——以及梯度動量的正交化，以 Muon 為例，並在光譜範數下進行最陡下降分析。這兩條路徑通常是孤立開發的。我們對 KL-Shampoo 的克羅內克預條件器做了一個結構觀察：它們的特徵值光譜呈現出一種 \emph{尖峰和平坦} 的形狀——少數主導特徵值後面跟隨著一個大約均勻的尾部——在各層和訓練階段中都保持一致，並在一個秩為 $ρ$ 的信號加噪聲梯度模型下完全成立。我們通過將 KL-Shampoo 的一個克羅內克因子限制為與尖峰和平坦形狀對齊的參數族來利用這一結構：在一個跟踪的 $r$ 維子空間上具有完整的光譜結構，在剩餘的 $n-r$ 方向上共享單一特徵值。在這些方向上，我們應用正交化。一個恆等式顯示，這種正交化恢復了完整 KL-Shampoo 的預條件器的代數形式。在四個預訓練規模（GPT-2 124M / 350M，LLaMA 134M / 450M）上，Pro-KLShampoo 在我們測試的每個子空間秩中，在驗證損失、每個 GPU 的峰值內存和達到每個損失水平的牆鐘時間上始終優於 KL-Shampoo。
2605.06316.author: Ruotong Sun et.al.
